name: AIFF PCM to WAV PCM
summary: Zero-dependency streaming conversion of classic AIFF integer PCM into RIFF/WAVE PCM.

scope: 1 through 32 valid sample bits in byte containers
Exact positive integer 80-bit extended sample rates
SSND offsets and multiple sound chunks
out_of_scope: Instrument, marker and application metadata migration

guarantees: PCM frame and channel order is unchanged
Eight-bit signedness and multi-byte endianness are converted deterministically
AIFF sample size is retained as WAVE valid bits
Exact integer sample rate is preserved
tradeoffs: Classic RIFF output is limited by 32-bit chunk sizes

properties: Frame and channel order are preserved
AIFF big-endian signed samples map to WAVE conventions
RIFF and chunk sizes include even-byte padding
fuzz: Planned: FORM graph, COMM, SSND, rate and metadata campaigns

limits: channels default to a maximum of 256
all offsets and output sizes are checked
known_risks: Seek or output I/O errors may occur after the WAVE header is written
static Adapter buffers forward-only protocol input
